channel.title: math.KT updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: math.KT updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Noncommutative Quillen-Lichtenbaum Conjecture
item.description: arXiv:2604.27373v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We establish isomorphism ranges for the comparison maps between algebraic and topological K-groups, extending classical Quillen-Lichtenbaum conjecture to separated complex schemes of finite type after refinement. Additionally, we generalizes the conjecture through the lens of noncommutative geometry.
item.dc:creator: Chunhui Wei
